205: // CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli uses the cli to create a new password credential in the
206: // provided static credential store.
207: // Returns the id of the new credential
208: func CreateStaticCredentialPasswordCli(t testing.TB, ctx context.Context, credentialStoreId string, user string, password string) (string, error) {
209: 	name, err := base62.Random(16)
210: 	if err != nil {
211: 		return "", err
212: 	}
213: 
214: 	output := e2e.RunCommand(ctx, "boundary",
215: 		e2e.WithArgs(
216: 			"credentials", "create", "username-password",
217: 			"-credential-store-id", credentialStoreId,
218: 			"-username", user,
219: 			"-password", "env://E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD",
220: 			"-name", fmt.Sprintf("e2e Credential %s", name),
221: 			"-description", "e2e",
222: 			"-format", "json",
223: 		),
224: 		e2e.WithEnv("E2E_CREDENTIALS_PASSWORD", password),

227: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("%w: %s", output.Err, string(output.Stderr))

231: 	err = json.Unmarshal(output.Stdout, &createCredentialsResult)

233: 		return "", err
234: 	}
235: 
236: 	credentialId := createCredentialsResult.Item.Id
237: 	t.Logf("Created Username/Password Credentials: %s", credentialId)
238: 	return credentialId, nil
239: }

160: 				return backoff.Permanent(

162: 				)
163: 			}
164: 
165: 			return nil
166: 		},
167: 		backoff.WithMaxRetries(backoff.NewConstantBackOff(3*time.Second), 5),
168: 		func(err error, td time.Duration) {
169: 			t.Logf("%s. Retrying...", err.Error())
170: 		},
171: 	)
172: 	require.NoError(t, err)
173: 	t.Log("Successfully deleted credential store")
174: }

176: func createPrivateKeyPemFile(fileName string) error {
177: 	key, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
178: 	if err != nil {
179: 		return err
180: 	}
181: 
182: 	pemFile, err := os.Create(fileName)
183: 	if err != nil {
184: 		return err
185: 	}
186: 	defer pemFile.Close()
187: 
188: 	privateKey := &pem.Block{
189: 		Type:  "RSA PRIVATE KEY",
190: 		Bytes: x509.MarshalPKCS1PrivateKey(key),
191: 	}
192: 
193: 	return pem.Encode(pemFile, privateKey)
194: }
195: 
196: // TestApiStaticCredentialStore uses the Go api to create a credential using
197: // boundary's built-in credential store. The test then attaches that credential to a target.
198: func TestApiStaticCredentialStore(t *testing.T) {
199: 	e2e.MaybeSkipTest(t)
200: 	c, err := loadTestConfig()
201: 	require.NoError(t, err)
202: 
203: 	client, err := boundary.NewApiClient()
204: 	require.NoError(t, err)
205: 	ctx := context.Background()
206: 
207: 	targetPort, err := strconv.ParseUint(c.TargetPort, 10, 32)
208: 	require.NoError(t, err)
209: 
210: 	orgId, err := boundary.CreateOrgApi(t, ctx, client)
211: 	require.NoError(t, err)
212: 	t.Cleanup(func() {
213: 		scopeClient := scopes.NewClient(client)
214: 		_, err := scopeClient.Delete(ctx, orgId)
215: 		require.NoError(t, err)
216: 	})
217: 	projectId, err := boundary.CreateProjectApi(t, ctx, client, orgId)
218: 	require.NoError(t, err)
219: 	hostCatalogId, err := boundary.CreateHostCatalogApi(t, ctx, client, projectId)
220: 	require.NoError(t, err)
221: 	hostSetId, err := boundary.CreateHostSetApi(t, ctx, client, hostCatalogId)
222: 	require.NoError(t, err)
223: 	hostId, err := boundary.CreateHostApi(t, ctx, client, hostCatalogId, c.TargetAddress)
224: 	require.NoError(t, err)
225: 	err = boundary.AddHostToHostSetApi(t, ctx, client, hostSetId, hostId)
226: 	require.NoError(t, err)
227: 	targetId, err := boundary.CreateTargetApi(t, ctx, client, projectId, "tcp", targets.WithTcpTargetDefaultPort(uint32(targetPort)))
228: 	require.NoError(t, err)
229: 	err = boundary.AddHostSourceToTargetApi(t, ctx, client, targetId, hostSetId)
230: 	require.NoError(t, err)
231: 	storeId, err := boundary.CreateCredentialStoreStaticApi(t, ctx, client, projectId)
232: 	require.NoError(t, err)
233: 
234: 	// Create credentials
235: 	cClient := credentials.NewClient(client)
236: 	k, err := os.ReadFile(c.TargetSshKeyPath)
237: 	require.NoError(t, err)
238: 	newCredentialsResult, err := cClient.Create(ctx, "ssh_private_key", storeId,
239: 		credentials.WithSshPrivateKeyCredentialUsername(c.TargetSshUser),
240: 		credentials.WithSshPrivateKeyCredentialPrivateKey(string(k)),
241: 	)
242: 	require.NoError(t, err)
243: 	newCredentialsId := newCredentialsResult.Item.Id
244: 	t.Logf("Created Credentials: %s", newCredentialsId)
245: 
246: 	updCredentialId, err := boundary.CreateStaticCredentialPasswordDomainApi(t, ctx, client, storeId, c.TargetSshUser, testPassword, testDomain)
247: 	require.NoError(t, err)
248: 	t.Logf("Created Credentials: %s", updCredentialId)
249: 
250: 	// Add credentials to target
251: 	tClient := targets.NewClient(client)
252: 	_, err = tClient.AddCredentialSources(ctx, targetId, 0,
253: 		targets.WithAutomaticVersioning(true),
254: 		targets.WithBrokeredCredentialSourceIds([]string{newCredentialsId, updCredentialId}),
255: 	)
256: 	require.NoError(t, err)
257: 
258: 	// Authorize Session
259: 	newSessionAuthorizationResult, err := tClient.AuthorizeSession(ctx, targetId)
260: 	require.NoError(t, err)
261: 	newSessionAuthorization := newSessionAuthorizationResult.Item
262: 	retrievedUser, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["username"].(string)
263: 	require.True(t, ok)
264: 	retrievedKey, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[0].Credential["private_key"].(string)
265: 	require.True(t, ok)
266: 	retrievedDomainUser, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[1].Credential["username"].(string)
267: 	require.True(t, ok)
268: 	retrievedDomainPW, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[1].Credential["password"].(string)
269: 	require.True(t, ok)
270: 	retrievedDomain, ok := newSessionAuthorization.Credentials[1].Credential["domain"].(string)
271: 	require.True(t, ok)
272: 	assert.Equal(t, c.TargetSshUser, retrievedUser)
273: 	assert.Equal(t, c.TargetSshUser, retrievedDomainUser)
274: 	assert.Equal(t, testPassword, retrievedDomainPW)
275: 	assert.Equal(t, testDomain, retrievedDomain)
276: 	require.Equal(t, string(k), retrievedKey)
277: 	t.Log("Successfully retrieved credentials for target")
278: }

(End of file - total 278 lines)
</content>

102: 		"boundary",
103: 		"connect", "redis",
104: 		"-target-id", targetId,
105: 	)
106: 
107: 	stdin, err := cmd.StdinPipe()
108: 	require.NoError(t, err)
109: 	stdout, err := cmd.StdoutPipe()
110: 	require.NoError(t, err)
111: 	require.NoError(t, cmd.Start())
112: 
113: 	output, err := sendRedisCommand(stdin, stdout, "SET e2etestkey e2etestvalue\r\n")
114: 	require.NoError(t, err)
115: 	require.Equal(t, "OK", output)
116: 
117: 	output, err = sendRedisCommand(stdin, stdout, "GET e2etestkey\r\n")
118: 	require.NoError(t, err)
119: 	require.Equal(t, "e2etestvalue", output)
120: 
121: 	output, err = sendRedisCommand(stdin, stdout, "QUIT\r\n")
122: 	require.Equal(t, io.EOF, err)
123: 	require.Empty(t, output)
124: 
125: 	// Confirm that boundary connect has closed
126: 	err = cmd.Wait()
127: 	require.NoError(t, err)
128: }
129: 
130: func sendRedisCommand(stdin io.WriteCloser, stdout io.ReadCloser, cmdStr string) (string, error) {
131: 	_, err := stdin.Write([]byte(cmdStr))
132: 	if err != nil {
133: 		return "", err
134: 	}
135: 	buf := make([]byte, 1024)
136: 	n, err := stdout.Read(buf)
137: 	if err != nil {
138: 		return "", err
139: 	}
140: 	return strings.TrimSpace(string(buf[:n])), nil
141: }

(End of file - total 141 lines)
